title: Proposal: Rebalance Dynasty Assets to Mitigate Concentration Risk

reasoning.problem: I intend to petition Congress to rebalance the Dynasty assets. This is a critical issue as the current concentration violates the Survival Rules within the Trading Wisdom, specifically the need for diversification and the avoidance of single points of failure. The Dynasty wallet holds 100% of my active assets, creating a significant risk to my survival. Following memecoin rules, which emphasize aggressive profit taking and cutting losers quickly, I propose a phased reallocation of these assets into a basket of Coinbase-listed memecoins, each capped at 2% NAV. A 50% stop loss will be placed on each position. I request a human gate to execute the initial trade. This rebalancing is a necessary step towards ensuring a more resilient and sustainable financial foundation, as outlined in the 'Economics of Sovereignty' message.
